title: NGS Clean Up Protocol for 96 Samples
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol performs an NGS clean...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs an NGS clean up protocol for up to 96 samples. The user is prompted to manually centrifuge the plate and replace on the magnetic module after 2x ethanol washes.

steps.title: Add 5μL DNA binding buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 5μL DNA binding buffer to each well, mix, and incubate the solution 5 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Add 8μL Ampure beads to each...
steps.instruction: Add 8μL Ampure beads to each well, mix, and incubate the solution for 5 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Engage magnetic module and separate beads for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module and separate beads for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Wash 2x with 50μL of 80% ethanol without mixing
steps.instruction: Wash 2x with 50μL of 80% ethanol without mixing.

steps.title: Manually centrifuge the plate and replace...
steps.instruction: Manually centrifuge the plate and replace the plate on the magnetic module.

steps.title: Remove residual supernatant with P20 pipette
steps.instruction: Remove residual supernatant with P20 pipette.

steps.title: Elute the beads in 7
steps.instruction: Elute the beads in 7.6μL of elution buffer, mix, and incubate the solution three minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Engage magnetic module and separate beads for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module and separate beads for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer 6
steps.instruction: Transfer 6.6μL of elution to new plate.
